[]: Shinji is the culprit in 3rd Impact + Kaworu's dead             Quote Post by Pnnn » Fri Dec 27, 2013 7:58 am Hi! I was rewatching all of the Rebuilds series and found out some really odd details. If those have been already spoted out, please tell me (and also, sorry for my bad english skills ;; ) Well, let's start. First of all, Shinji is, indeed, the culprit behind the third impact. Why? Well, all of the people probalby became FOIs instead of LCL like in EoE, and FOIs are a copy of Unit01 . Also, Mk. 06 sacrificed itself in order to stop Third Impact, what doesn't make sense, since SEELE's original plan was in fact to end everything in Third Impact, maybe they went desperate and used Mk. 06 to stop NERV's plans, but well, we can clearly see in 3.0 that SEELE and NERV are still togheter (even though it's one-sided). So we can say that it was Kaworu who has stopped Third Impact himself. Even though he has said in 3.0 that Mk. 06 has been 'changed to an autonomous-type', it makes no sense for SEELE to build a control system to just throw it away in Mk. 06's second usage, and using the term 'autonomous' can be just a trick to hide it's true pilot (see below). Now back to Shinji, we can clearly see him at the beggining of 3.0 in a state kinda like he was in EoE, so humanity had no more value for him, as he just wanted to sacrifice everything in order to save Rei in 2.0. Putting this Shinji in EoE's scenario, would he really even care in stopping Third Impact? Guess no, he would probably want to stay with Rei. From this point on, we can clearly see that Shinji is in fact the most possible culprit of the Third Impact. Now, we can clearly see in 3.0 that NERV's ruins has some 'scars of battle', but what would anyone be fighting against? The scenario reminds me SO MUCH of the JSPD attack against Unit02 in EoE, so yes, maybe they were trying to stop an EVA, and this EVA would be Unit01 , who, during 2.0, was in complete control of Shinji , differently from episode 19 from the original anime. There's also some strange things that Shinji shouldn't know about the 14 years time skip. It's like he being the first one to call out Mk. 06 name in the movie before anyone does, even though he has never seen nor never heard about this Evangelion, or maybe has he? So now we can kinda trace what happened: 12th angel attacked, Mk. 06, Unit02 or Unit08 removed the Cassius' Spear from Unit01 in order to try to stop the angel. Shinji awakes and continues the Third Impact for 'Rei's sake' (?). Lilith awakes because of the 12th angel and starts true Third Impact togheter with Shinji and Unit01. Mk. 06 sacrifices itself using the two lances in order to stop Third Impact, so Shinji could be happy . Now, for the other thing, Kaworu is dead. Not only once though. I just noticed something really odd about Kaworu. We, of course, can see that there's a lot of 'boxes' in the moon that, probably, contains Kaworu's clones or otherselves. We don't know precisely how many boxes there were, but from what we see, there's five or six boxes open. Now, time for a crazy theory! Every Kaworu is just a personification of an Evangelion , yes. Now, how? Well, how could 5~6 Kaworus die before the story starts? I think it's not possible, nor the moon being aware of a time travel, as some people are talking about Kaworu being a time traveler. So, in 3.0 we can clearly see that Kaworu is just spotted as the Thirteenth Angel once he's inside of Unit13. Also no one knows about him. How, in the Earth, would no one in WILLE know about an Eva pilot that, probably, could have spent some time with them between 2.0 and 3.0? My guess is that they never knew about Kaworu (so calling Mk. 06 autonomous isn't actually an error, but a misconception) or the Kaworu they knew has been killed inside of Mk. 06. Other thing that has been bugging me is that nor Unit01, nor Mk. 06 nor 'Kaworu 06' has been spotted as an Angel by NERV in 2.0, why? Because they already have been registred as allies in MAGI. Unit01 is clearly shown as some kind of Blood-Type Blue in 1.0, but she has never been spotted as an Angel, just like Kaworu. He has only been spotted as an angel once inside Unit13, and as the Thirteenth Angel , so from this, we can guess that once changing from the First to the Thirteenth Angel, he has also changed from the personification of Unit01 to Unit13, and that's MAYBE why Shinji cannot synch with Unit01 anymore, she has lost her 'personification'. That's all for now, I think. If there's something I forgot now, I'll add later. See you! (And sorry for every English mistake. ;; )

[]: Just more ideas...             Quote Post by yogurtforthesoul » Tue Jan 28, 2014 9:23 am I have no real concrete ideas at the moment about what happened. like many of you I want some more information before I make my final leap to a conclusion (I REALLY hope 4.0/4.44 can help us out here, mostly by giving us WILLE's side of the story). From what I saw in 3.0, I must conclude that it was indeed a very quick (and as so many have complained about--the 14 year gap and the lack of information to help us out--plus the fact that ALL the characters on the "WILLE" side of things were in fact side characters...which hurt Asuka so much, when I expected to see so much interaction with her... which basically means that if they decide to do ANY romantic side to this story they are left with almost no possibilities unless they do one hell of a job in 4.0 on Shinji's & Asuka's relationship, which is what we had in the old series; unless they truly want to play the ridiculous: "incestuous clone" idea, especially now that Shinji knows about it) rehash of Neon Evangelion from were 2.0 leaves off and ends at End Of Evangelion (this time though we have Rei, Asuka, & Shinji walking in the red desert towards an uncertain future). I wonder if we really have gotten this far already in the series, therefore providing us with a movie, 4.0, that will in fact be completely new and ultimately not based on old show material (only lore and myth). This could be a big reason why there IS hope for Shinji in this next movie, because the ultimate let down and depression we receive in End Of Evangelion has already come and passed. So, onto 3rd impact. To me, I am utterly confused as to why everyone is giving Shinji the stink-eye over this matter. I have so many reasons for this that it isn't worth naming them all. I'm more than sure humanity would find their "pariah" to hang from the rafters for 3rd impact occurring. Hell, for all we know they may have used Shinji to some extent as an excuse to make sure that all of NERV's staff weren't shot on site, when I assume at some point the JSDF came in-in force, taking down headquarters. The real cause for the FULL impact is even more troubling. It is obvious at the end of 2.0 that the 3rd impact WAS stopped. Most likely before most of the city was even fully destroyed above (though the central part of Tokyo 3 was obviously gutted). All Shinji did, never knowing of course that he did ANY of this, was open the doors of Guf and awaken Unit 01 (of course this is ALL assumption, as it is just as likely that YUI granted Shinji's wish to save Rei and awoken herself, leaving Shinji mostly out of this equation once he returns to Unit 01 with Rei). Rei more than likely cannot be pulled out of Unit 01 in 3.0 due to the fact that Yui is the core and Rei is essentially the same person--so in some terms they may have merged OR Rei may have became part of the control system. We also find out that Shinji's sync ratio is at 0. But, what we don't know are these things: we know later on he uses a EVA with Kaworu just fine (though we don't know if this is part of Kaworu's abilities as an angel, the first); it could also be that they lied to him, as they literally don't want him to even believe that he is capable of using an EVA; but, I really think that he just couldn't sync with Unit 01 (and I'd have to see if it's possible to check to see indeed if it showed on-screen that this is what they used as a baseline) because the last thing he told Rei is that he didn't want to pilot an EVA...if she is now part of the control system of Unit 01, I imagine he can use Unit 01 just fine but first he must demand Rei to allow him to do so (or she must sense it in him). The Unit also activated to save Asuka, again pointing out that Shinji being at 0 is somehow...flawed (he was in an "awakened" machine, for all we know they don't have the ability to "measure" results of a pilot that has been through that...for example what if his scores were actually 1000% or worse, infinity...). I think third impact may have gone a bit like this (with some minor changes here and there, especially when it comes to the spears). We are assuming, for now, that there are two spears. One that Kaworu brought from the moon (his spear), and Lilith's spear (which was in her in central dogma). Kaworu's was used to stop third impact--it worked. Now, we know that there were other EVAs, we also know that Shinji's friend died...and if anything like the series it was also in an EVA. I think he may have been the pilot of EVA 06 when it got taken by the then "assimilated" Lilith. But, the angel was in Mark 06... Also BOTH spears were in central dogma--more than likely because they faced an opponent akin to what was in the series: one that stayed in orbit and required them to pull the spear from Lilith. At some point another angel came and did make it to central dogma, Mark 06 tried to stop it or did...we don't know; we just know it had been assimilated (more than likely by the angel; and since Lilith decided to punish Shinji's "sin" by turning souls into "Unit 01" a new species that looked alike (I assume the size variance was due to whether somebody was fat, tall, adult, teenager, or a child...etc...). So when they yanked the spears out, the angel took Lilith's "powers" of old (I assume, which means humans no matter what HAVE to use Unit 01 at this point to "recreate" the first sin, preferably while destroying the remnants of Adam on the Moon...making a future SEELE issue impossible), possibly. It also then took on the form of three things I think: it first transferred to the Mark 06, the "new species" of Lilith; then it took on the form of man, the old form of Lilith; then it re-created itself into what IT thought was the "perfect being": the red core sphere. But it was ultimately killed by the first angel, but in doing so it caused the first to possibly "evolve" and "awaken" into the 13th and "unknown" angel. I think this is why Kaworu had such a bad feeling before this all began and once he saw the spears it fully confirmed that Lilith had truly screwed him over along with "The King of The Lilin" (Shinji's dad). I think the spears changed to the same shape as they are more than likely meant for Unit 01 to use them in the future, as it is Shinji (with the control system of Unit 01) deciding the fate of mankind and how things will change; this is why the spears are the same because both spears are no longer meant for two separate souls. One can now accomplish this. I imagine that the little thing Gendo has, "the key", will allow him to do what I said before: annihilate Adam's offspring from Earth. but, ultimately this may mean, again, like EoE, that everyone must trust Shinji to do the right thing when he again opens the door of Guf; but, this time Lilith will be gone, no longer to create a "sin" and Adam will be "controlled" by Gendo... Meaning that this time around in creation's history mankind will be the true God of himself; no longer beholden to some ancient and incredibly powerful alien technology... I'm guessing that they had to pull the spear out of Shinji to deal with the 12th angel, because not only did they have to spear Lilith, but once the stupid angel "awoke" they more than likely needed a second spear. That is when Shinji or maybe I should say Unit 01 finished what it started and passed through the doors of Guf (probably before Lilith was out, hence why she created Shinji's "sin"). Again, none of this is or ever was Shinji's fault. Even Misato wanted Shinji to do it, so if he could EVEN hear them...he heard nothing of support (and by the time they were warning anyone about third impact he was already in the "quantum state" or past the critical thresh-hold, rescuing Rei). No one ever told Shinji ANY of these risks, that him delving into the critical area would create that mishap. he didn't know he had another person on board. He most certainly didn't know that there was an ancient alien mechanism in central dogma that was referred to as "Lilith" that would turn things into EVAs--a herald of her new "offspring"; the new creatures that attack Misato's crew and humanity in general all the time (and of course we have no idea how any of this worked). Blaming third impact on Shinji is perhaps on of the most ridiculous things in the world. Not only did they stop it, but they CHOSE to pull the thing out of Shinji without any plan to stop what they had to know was coming. Those that were in charge created the crapfeast we see in 3.0, Misato, SEELE, Gendo, and others. Shinji was merely an errand boy, one that finally decided to use the power in his hands to do the right thing--and everyone hates him for it. That is why I see 3.0 as being the true replacement for EoE, and 4.0 will be a "breath of fresh air" for the series. Perhaps finally giving us, and as it says...Shinji...some hope. I would also note that I think the containers on the moon did in fact contain other clones of Kaworu. Rei is very much used to control the EVAs, so in turn I wonder if they use a "dummy system" or control system based on Kaworu and HE is in fact ALL of the angels...? Any ideas on that? Though there are other options, though I have no doubt that all of the angels are or have been sent by SEELE. It seems highly likely to me that this is in fact true, given that he IS Adam, the angel responsible for ANGELS that took from the tree of life, unlike the kindred that use the tree of knowledge that Liltith provided. A process a "planet seeding" that, at least in old Evangelion mythology an ancient alien civilization created all the angels along with their "moons" which contained the seeds of life or souls. Adam and Lilith screwed (she had been damaged I believe; then crashing into Earth only made her situation worse) up upon arriving at Earth (as it is supposed to be one or the other, never both; whoever gets to Earth first is the one that uses the planet; the other leaves or self-destructs...BUT, in this even t, Lilith arrived at Earth when Adam was already here, but she was unable to do anything about her circumstances as she was damaged; her "self-destruct mechanism" or fail-safe was HER spear, created for HER and it only works on her; all of this failed and it eventually resulted in the "original sin": the creation of mankind). The short of it is that Adam interacted with Lilith and Adam shut himself down, but he already had his copies on the planet, which allowed Lilith's to take over the copies or souls on Earth: THUS the trees of both life AND knowledge, merged (since the first angels looked like Kaworu, Lilith merely added knowledge to the mix... man then became, technically, the final angel of them all). --A small explanation for those wondering about the origins; though you can find better versions of what I said with much more information that what I wrote above if you wish to know about it--it may have slightly changed for rebuild (for one fact the amount of spears "in play" are different; so they have rethought some of this, if not ALL of it...there may no longer be an "alien civilization" with advanced "terraforming" and colony ships called the: black and white moons; though it could be mostly the same, they just changed what exactly happened to Adam and Lilith once they arrived at Earth). Sorry for the length; but, I doubt anyone reading these topics and messages is too concerned over length (if you are a TL;DR person, I hate to say it, but I think you may be in the wrong place...especially the wrong thread). --Feel free to add on or change things to make my ideas more complete or accurate if you like them.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Jan 28, 2014 11:02 am ^ Wow, you seems to mix up a lot of things here, it's hard to follow your point, but answering what I understood : - Lilith don't plotted anything in 3.0, by the time of the movie she's dead, what you see in her Chamber is exactly what Kaworu described : her corpse, only maintaining its image and shape thanks to the two spears. Whatever happened that changed the Cassius spear into a Longinus was Gendo's (and Fuyutsuki) doing alone. He freaked out because he noticed that on of the spears hey needed for their plan mysteriously transformed into another type, completely ruining their plan. - we're not sure from what the Failures of Infinity are made of, it's possible that they were created from people's souls harvested, or maybe they are just soulless "minions" created by Lilith to defend herself. I highly doubt that Lilith created them as a "punishment' for Shinji, as I don't see Lilith(if there's still a consciousness inside it) giving a rat-ass about the acts of one of her Lilins, besides what would be the point for Lilith to do that? As for why the FoIs are made at EVA-01, it's still a mystery. One theory is that EVA-01's Near Third Impact so close to Lilith altered her somehow and made her create copies of Unit 01. Another is that, like in NGE, EVA-01 is made directly from Lilith's flesh(instead of being a clone of ADAM) and that Rei II carries the soul of Lilith, and that when Rei II ended inside EVA-01, since it's made from Lilith's flesh, it remotely affected Lilith's main body which took Rei's image since her soul now identified itself as Rei Ayanami. It's the same process than Lilith taking Rei's image after she's reunited with it in EoE, except that this time it's "wireless". - the "new creatures that attack Misato's crew and humanity in general all the time" are the Evangelions Mark.04 "Nemesis Series" , automated Evangelion-attack drones created and controlled by SEELE and neo-NERV and which apparently serves as the bulk of their military force. - about Shinji's 0.000% synch ratio, he test was made with EVA-01 only : [wkimg]File:Eva3-33 C0278D zero.jpg[/wkimg] Look at the "Object : EVA-01" label just under the big 0.0000% WILLE never doubted that he could still pilot an Eva, that's why they told him to absolutely not pilot one when he decided to escape with Mark.09, and that would use a DSS Choker useless if he indeed lost the ability to pilot, it's his ability to awake an Eva he pilots that WILLE fears. He probably managed to awake EVA-01 to save Asuka because he was still absorbed in it back then, therefor was a "part" of it, but now that he regained a physical form, that union with EVA-01 was severed, hence the null synch ratio. - to get back on topic, on the events after 2.0, from what we saw during the post-credit scene in 2.0 and in 3.0, it's clear that something else happened sometime after Shinji's N3I, and that whatever turned the Hakone region into a red desert(and maybe the rest of the world with it) happened at that moment, not when Shinji awoke EVA-01. WILLE obviously blames Shinji for something, but until we get their side of the story, we can't say what for sure, maybe the damages he inflicted to the Geofront helped the 12th Angel to reach Lilith and starts Third Impact, so it's indirectly his fault, maybe they don't know that Shinji could see what was happening outside and think that he deliberately wanted to destroy the world just to save Rei, the fact he's the son of Gendo Ikari who indeed wants to destroy the world to get reunited with his loved one, probably didn't helped his case. Or maybe it's a combination of the above theories. Finally, we don't know if EVA-01 was awakened again when the spear of Cassius was removed to be used on the 12th Angel(if it wasn't removed before without incidents), in fact it's probable that it didn't made EVA-01 awake again, since then how would had NERV stopped it without a spear? Unit 1 wasn't impaled by a spear while in the tesseract.

We, the audience, know this best; we saw the entire movie basically through Shinji's eyes and were left with the expression of: "WTF"? He did however get rid of SEELE's "pawn"...and I hate to call Kaworu this, but he was indeed SEELE's pawn, as Rei is almost always Gendo's pawn... So, during N3I, when Unit 01 begins to become a radiant giant (just as Shinji tells Rei that he will save her no matter what and he begins his descent into the core of the angel) I have some questions left over Shinji's culpability in N3I at all. We know that Gendo is readily heard before hand talking about "hastening the awakening of Unit 01" after he stops talking with SEELE and realizes they are taking steps to finalize their own agenda. When Unit 01 starts to become a radiant giant there is a very quick shot of the restriction devices and supports giving out around Unit 01's core (where Yui technically now resides). At first I thought this was merely just a scene showing Unit 01 becoming a radiant giant and recreating 2nd impact--the forces involved are literally ripping off the constrictions that hold Unit 01 together. But these same things may also KEEP Unit 01 FROM awakening, or being able too, IF they function properly. Specifically if Shinji goes into the "critical zone"--as he does--the unit should be able to handle it under normal conditions (of course many things were abnormal at this point--for one thing Unit 01 was again seen moving as though it had "limitless" power in it; as though it had an "S2" engine...or whatever it is called in Rebuild; these are the same devices that supposedly caused the destruction at the EVA base over seas, and what prompted the U.S. to force Japan to take Unit 03). It occurs to me that Gendo may have done far more (and I'm in fact more than sure he DID do more than talk--he NEVER leaves things to "chance", at least not exactly) talk about "hastening" Unit 01's awakening. What if he weakened or destroyed vital areas that allowed Unit 01 to "contain" itself and not awaken when Shinji (and Unit 01 to some degree) was in a very dangerous situation, like the critical zone--as I said you can clearly see in a very good shot...specific shot possibly...that the chest-plate that armored the core of Unit 01 fully broke apart. The other question that should be answered is why can Unit 01 still function without power? Does it have a "S2" engine already or is it merely (and I think this is the real reason, otherwise I think SEELE would have destroyed Unit 01 or taken it away a long time ago) because Yui is inside the core of Unit 01; essentially a soul acts exactly like a "S2" engine would. I'm wondering if this is what we will learn of in 4.0 and so will the members of WILLE (it may even be true that Misato and possibly Katsuragi already DO know about this, hence...beyond being emotionally attached to Shinji...why Misato couldn't pull the trigger on the detonator when Rei took him--and if they deemed it necessary they may have told others, like Asuka and Mari) that Gendo truly caused N3I and that Shinji had nothing to do with it (other then getting in the cockpit, but Gendo more than likely knew that 01 was going to awaken as soon as it's battery life hit 0:00). It could also be that either Yui is "always" able to reactivate Unit 01 if in dire need (or even radically alter it) and if she fears for her child's safety OR Gendo may also need to input some kind of "release" code, allowing Yui to have full control over Unit 01 once it's battery life (basically everything Shinji could do) is terminated. Basically this would account for the first event--which Gendo may have allowed Yui to "partially" use Unit 01 to her liking, and then 3rd impact, when she "awoke" and granted the wish of her child. But, we know obviously that Yui can do things without these type of "instructions" or "code/hardware changes" as she absolutely refused to allow them to use the dummy system after Gendo nearly forced HER and indirectly Shinji to almost kill Asuka (and Gendo couldn't begin to figure out why she was "unhappy" with him and disallowed the dummy system from being used...what an idiot, he definitely deserves the karma crap-pie that is due for him, something we will hopefully get in 4.0--unless like in EoE, Gendo actually has some remnant of a soul left and DOES care for his son and wife...not just his needs and desires...and actually has a final plan that reaches beyond restoring his wife--who HAS actually been with him this entire time in Unit 01...but Gendo is blind to this fact, but also aims to reclaim humanity, Earth, and mankind as well)... The continuation of N3I, I think, can be partially blamed on almost everyone. But, Shinji, exclusively, has Kaworu's blood on his hands. ------ BTW- For an alternate idea of what happened at N3I, and when Shinji was impaled by Unit 06 and Kaworu. The timeline doesn't exactly match-up for this (and I haven't thought out the side impacts that would not let this occur) and to be honest I would hate to think that Kaworu IS in fact this much of a liar (and very much a complete pawn of SEELE's and may in fact WANT mankind to "change" or perish to some degree). What if SEELE had in fact completed another EVA by the time we see Kaworu impale Shinji at N3I (and they sent it somewhere, nearby, for Kaworu to use--close to NERV headquarters). What if Kaworu started third impact again once he had Unit 01 in a location he could deal with, had Unit 06 in it's position to make a run on Lilith and her spear--from a SEELE directive (possibly autonomous or using his "angel powers" to control it from the outside--much like he did in Neon Evangelion). If Kaworu set things up correctly (and worse, if there are actually clones of Kaworu--the clone--SEELE's version of "Rei", or Yui--would do the "dirty work", like controlling angels or just exposing and attacking Lilith, restarting N3I at as SEELE wanted it...if he was in charge of the angel--was the angel--that came to Lilith's doorstep like in Neon Evangelion and then again either a clone or the real Kaworu came to NERV to act as the SEELE's envoy and became Shinji's friend--he also mentioned that Shinji would "see him again"; was that a metaphorical/metaphysical comment, as it seemed to be or did Kaworu truly mean that Shinji indeed would soon see him again as another clone of him existed; these clones may have been controlling the angels directly or have been installed in the core, but that seems semi-unlikely as Rei was "alone" in 2.0 when she was in the angel's core...from what we know) it may have looked to everyone at NERV and especially to all from the "outside" world that Unit 01 or Shinji directly caused third impact... It may also be that Unit 06 was the main cause at first, possibly the angel that got into central dogma (explaining why NERV didn't vaporize itself), but once it was assimilated or someone got into Unit 06 and override the autonomous control of Unit 06 stopped the continuation of N3I, but at the cost of the pilot's life (and i think we can guess who that was, if it was true). The question is what happened when they removed the spear from Unit 01 in the time-skip AND who did it (who put him in the tesseract, who built it and for what purpose originally, who put him in orbit, etc...)? If the 3rd impact DIDN'T resume due to the spear being removed from Unit 01 (and I actually find it hard to believe that it happened this way, because if it did shouldn't we still have a spear in Unit 01, to stop it yet again and to keep N3I from again resuming), then why does everyone believe Shinji is the main culprit for N3I and the BULK of its horrific effects caused by Unit 01's awakening? Yet from what we saw in 2.0, he hardly did anything other than open the doors of Guf for a minute and cause some decent damage right around Tokyo 3--unless as stated it resumed once the spear was removed. But 3rd impact was NEVER completed, it was stopped (three times, as far as we know for now) again and we know that an angel even got to Lilith. If you ask me, THAT is what really did it; unless we find out that there was some kind of "body-jumping" angel that hijacked Unit 01 while Shinji was out cold with Rei and HE was "the angel" that descended on Lilith (which would directly explain why we have copies of Unit 01, created in mass by Lilith as her "new species" and also to mark Shinji's "sin"; right now Shinji's "sin" seems almost indirect in nature...almost as though Lilith hates anyone that dares to tread on grounds that would open the Doors Of Guf and punishes Earth in response; but, as I said, whatever removed the spear from Lilith TRULY caused Earth to descend into the madness we got in 3.0--or possibly the angel that got to her if it assimilated her even before the spear was "yanked out"). Again, if Unit 01 did this, it would be impossible for NERV to self-destruct; then the angel could leave him for Lilith (and once it did then it would "transcend and awaken" and cause 3rd impact to resume, with Lilith passing a final judgement before she died, killing Lilith afterwards)? That is the majority of my "other idea" or "evil Kaworu" theory, but I doubt it works out or that it's true (especially since I think they are going for a different approach in Rebuild and this idea would be too close to EoE and Neon Evangelion's conclusion and it's explanations)--due to the timeline and too many problems with what others said and facts about N3I, it's events, and after effects... But, I STILL have a lot of questions to have answered, many of them ask things that directly involve N3I and what caused it and why it was caused. We don't yet know fully what the tesseract specifically does/did in this version... BUT that again leaves more questions, because WILLE had to remove Unit 01 from it to use it and there was no spear visible either (in fact it looked like Unit 01 had been repaired to some degree; but, I'll admit that Unit 01's "pseudo-form" may have repaired it or even made it look that way--by replacing missing parts much like it replaced it's left arm in 2.0). So what in fact DID cause third impact to resume, what stopped it, who stopped it, how many times did it "resume again"...was it more than just once, how much time went by before anyone got to (besides Unit 06 and Kaworu or SEELE) Unit 01, when was the spear removed from Unit 01 and why did they do it...what happened when they did it (as Cassius was the spear in Unit 01, so does this mean that Kaworu was anywhere near the events that transpired with the angel and Lilith and since he heard that two spears had been used he assumed, naturally, that the spears at the bottom of central dogma were in fact the original Longinus and the Cassius used on Unit 01; the truth is that Gendo removed Cassius from Unit 01 and hid it away somewhere...more than likely he, Rei, and Kozo know where it now resides), was anyone ever in Unit 06--was it partially autonomous for awhile, we assume the 12th angel--the "final angel"--got to Lilith...but what all transpired and what was the angel like, when did the SSDF (or JSDF and possibly the U.N.) decide to intervene and take NERV, does Kaworu agree with SEELE or have any idea of their plans, who made the tesseract and when, who put Shinji in orbit and why (why there--I'm assuming it was because SEELE didn't want ANYONE to be able to use what was there, "the power to kill God"...), and so many more...??? I hope we get a fairly good idea of just what happened in 4.0, because right now...like Shinji...us as an audience have almost no idea as to what is going on all thanks to that acid hit induced by the time jump.

I was rewatching all of the Rebuilds series and found out some really odd details. If those have been already spoted out, please tell me (and also, sorry for my bad english skills ;; ) Well, let's start. First of all, Shinji is, indeed, the culprit behind the third impact. Why? Well, all of the people probalby became FOIs instead of LCL like in EoE, and FOIs are a copy of Unit01 . Also, Mk. 06 sacrificed itself in order to stop Third Impact, what doesn't make sense, since SEELE's original plan was in fact to end everything in Third Impact, maybe they went desperate and used Mk. 06 to stop NERV's plans, but well, we can clearly see in 3.0 that SEELE and NERV are still togheter (even though it's one-sided). So we can say that it was Kaworu who has stopped Third Impact himself. Now back to Shinji, we can clearly see him at the beggining of 3.0 in a state kinda like he was in EoE, so humanity had no more value for him, as he just wanted to sacrifice everything in order to save Rei in 2.0. Putting this Shinji in EoE's scenario, would he really even care in stopping Third Impact? Guess no, he would probably want to stay with Rei. From this point on, we can clearly see that Shinji is in fact the most possible culprit of the Third Impact. Now, we can clearly see in 3.0 that NERV's ruins has some 'scars of battle', but what would anyone be fighting against? The scenario reminds me SO MUCH of the JSPD attack against Unit02 in EoE, so yes, maybe they were trying to stop an EVA, and this EVA would be Unit01 , who, during

 anyone be fighting against? There's also some strange things that Shinji shouldn't know about the 14 years time skip. It's like he being the first one to call out Mk. 06 name in the movie before anyone does, even though he has never seen nor never heard about this Evangelion, or maybe has he? So now we can kinda trace what happened: 12th angel attacked, Mk. 06, Unit02 or Unit08 removed the Cassius' Spear from Unit01 in order to try to stop the angel. Shinji awakes and continues the Third Impact for 'Rei's sake' (?). Lilith awakes because of the 12th angel and starts true Third Impact togheter with Shinji and Unit01. Mk. 06 sacrifices itself using the two lances in order to stop Third Impact, so Shinji could be happy . Now, for the other thing, Kaworu is dead. Not only once though. I just noticed something really odd about Kaworu. We, of course, can see that there's a lot of 'boxes' in the moon that, probably, contains Kaworu's clones or otherselves. We don't know precisely how many boxes there were, but from what we see, there's five or six boxes open. Now, time for a crazy theory! Every Kaworu is just a personification of an Evangelion , yes. Now, how? Well, how could 5~6 Kaworus die before the story starts? I think it's not possible, nor the moon being aware of a time travel, as some people are talking about Kaworu being a time traveler. So, in 3.0 we can clearly see that Kaworu is just spotted as the Thirteenth Angel once he's inside of Unit13. Also no one knows about him. How, in the Earth, would no one in WILLE know about an Eva pilot that, probably, could have spent some time with them between 2.0 and 3.0? My guess is that they never knew about Kaworu (so calling Mk. 06 autonomous isn't actually an error, but a misconception) or the Kaw

Article: Shinji is the culprit in 3rd Impact Kaworus dead
, could have spent some time with them between 2.0 and 3.0?
